- **License:** <!-- MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC0 / CC-BY / CC-BY-SA / other -->
- **Approx stars:**

## Why it belongs here (one line)

<!-- What does it teach that isn't already covered? Which topic file should link it? -->

## License discipline

> We ship MIT. We only *adapt* MIT / Apache-2.0 / CC0 content (with attribution). CC-BY-SA and autogen CC-BY-4.0 sources are **link + commentary only** — never copied verbatim.

- [ ] This resource can be **linked** freely.
- [ ] If we'd adapt text/code from it, its license permits that (MIT/Apache/CC0) and I noted attribution.

## Checklist

- [ ] The link works and the resource is current (2024–2026).
- [ ] It's annotated (one line on *why*), not a bare dump.
- [ ] It's not already in `resources.md` or a `content/` file.
